summary: Tested unified photo features including full-stats endpoint, selfie-match endpoint, profile picture update, and PVP WebSocket prefix. All backend tests passed (12/13, 1 skipped). Frontend UI verified - Minted Photos page displays photo cards with dollar values, levels, XP, stamina, scenery badges correctly. PVP Battle Arena accessible with Create/Join/Bot options.
critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED: /api/minting/photo/{mint_id}/full-stats endpoint returns all required fields for unified display (dollar_value, level, xp, stars, scenery_type, win_streak, lose_streak, stamina, authenticity scores)
VERIFIED: Profile picture update endpoint (PUT /api/users/me/profile-picture) validates image_url and mint_id ownership
VERIFIED: Selfie-match endpoint validates photo has face detection before allowing match attempt
VERIFIED: PVP game start returns websocket_url with /api/ws/pvp-game/ prefix
VERIFIED: Minted Photos page displays UnifiedPhotoCard with dollar values ($720.0M, $440.0M, etc.), levels (Lvl 4-7), stamina (100/24), scenery badges (+Natural, +Water, -Man-made)
seed_data_creation: None - used existing test user with 7 minted photos
context_for_next_testing_agent: Unified photo features verified. Full-stats endpoint returns complete photo data for synchronization. Profile picture update works via PUT /api/users/me/profile-picture. Selfie-match endpoint exists at POST /api/minting/photo/{mint_id}/selfie-match (requires photo with face detection). PVP WebSocket uses /api/ws/pvp-game/{room_id}/{token} prefix. Test user test@blendlink.com has 7 minted photos with portfolio value $4.51B.

selfie_match_endpoint.notes: Validates photo has face detection, costs 100 BL per attempt, max 3 attempts

profile_picture_update.notes: Validates image_url required, validates mint_id ownership

pvp_websocket_prefix.notes: WebSocket URL returned from game start endpoint

mocked_apis_list: Facebook Graph API for engagement reactions
